item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 23min Winners of the Epsom Oaks since 2006:
• 2006 – Alexandrova (4/1) • 2007 – Light Shift (25/1) • 2008 – Look Here (33/1) • 2009 – Sariska (11/4) • 2010 – Snow Fairy (8/1) • 2011 – Dancing Rain (20/1) • 2012 – Was (20/1) • 2013 – Talent (20/1) • 2014 – Taghrooda (5/1) • Mostrar más 1 1 3 4 mil

item.title: R_Forristal: Richard Forristal @R_Forristal · 47min And then finishes with a bit of a flourish. Stewards probably won’t even look at
item.description: Richard Forristal @R_Forristal · 47min And then finishes with a bit of a flourish. Stewards probably won’t even look at it. ‘Never in a position to challenge.’ @RacingPost Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 1h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 1 9 1 mil
